rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE GEORGE F. THOMAS AND FREDA M. THOMAS REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer Of Respondent Peter Fortune To Petitioner Bin Bin Thomas'S Petition
rulings.Rulings: Hearing on this demurrer is continued to March 25, 2026 at 2:00 p.m., to allow parties to brief the court on the impact to the pending demurrer, if any, of the First District Court of Appeal's recent ruling in Halperin v. Halperin (No. A172110, 2026 WL 236310 (Cal. Ct. App. Jan. 29, 2026), which has been certified for publication. One supplemental brief per party shall be filed and served by February 27, 2026.
